_instructions: Each profile has free-text description + hidden canonical attributes. Ground truth is computed by rule_engine.py against these attributes.

test_cases.profile_text: I'm a 25-year-old farmer in Punjab with 2 acres of land. I grow wheat and rice. My annual income is around ₹2,00,000. I want to grow my income but don't have capital.
I'm a 19-year-old SC student from Tamil Nadu, currently pursuing my Bachelor's degree. My family's annual income is ₹2,00,000. I'm looking for educational support.
I'm a 32-year-old woman from Delhi running a small tailoring business. My business income is ₹1,80,000 per year. I want to expand but need capital.
I'm a 68-year-old widow living in Uttar Pradesh. My late husband was a farmer. I have no income now and live with my son. My family's annual income is ₹80,000.
I'm a parent of a 5-year-old girl. I want to secure her future through long-term savings. Our family income is ₹4,00,000 per year.
I'm a 45-year-old street vendor selling snacks on the footpath near Bangalore railway station. My annual income is around ₹1,50,000. I need working capital.
I'm a 28-year-old IT professional in Pune with an annual salary of ₹6,00,000. I want to buy my first home. I currently rent an apartment.
I'm a 55-year-old doctor earning ₹15,00,000 per year in Mumbai. I own my home and car. I pay income tax. I'm looking for investment opportunities.
I'm a 22-year-old daily wage worker in Mumbai helping my father in his small mechanical workshop. I earn around ₹1,20,000 per year. I want a secure retirement plan.
I'm a 36-year-old SC woman running a small food processing business in Madhya Pradesh. My business income is ₹2,20,000 per year. I want to scale up.
I'm a 52-year-old homeowner in Bangalore with a suitable rooftop. I have an active electricity connection and currently pay ₹4,000/month. No other solar subsidy availed.
I'm a 20-year-old girl from a poor family in Bihar, currently studying B.Com at a state university. My family's annual income is ₹3,50,000. I need help with tuition.
I'm a 24-year-old B.Tech graduate from a state engineering college. I'm currently unemployed and seeking an internship opportunity. I'm not eligible for IIT/premium school exclusions.
I'm a 28-year-old OBC individual from Rajasthan wanting to start a bakery business. I have a solid business plan but no prior business experience. Annual family income is ₹4,50,000.
I'm a 35-year-old parent of a 7-year-old son. I want to start long-term retirement savings for him via NPS. My family income is ₹7,50,000 per year.
I'm a 40-year-old salaried employee in Pune. I earn ₹9,00,000 per year. I want to buy an electric two-wheeler for commuting. Annual family income qualifies for subsidy.
I'm a 35-year-old married woman from Mumbai, Maharashtra. My husband's income is ₹1,80,000 per year. My family doesn't have income tax payers or govt employees. I'm looking for financial support.
I'm a 20-year-old girl from Bhubaneswar, Odisha, from an economically weaker background. My family's annual income is ₹2,20,000. I want to know about women empowerment schemes.
I'm a 45-year-old widow from Raipur, Chhattisgarh. My late husband was a farmer. My family's income is ₹2,50,000 per year. No family member pays income tax or works in government.
I'm a 50-year-old household head in Hyderabad, Telangana. My family holds a White Ration Card (Food Security Card). Our monthly electricity consumption is about 150 units.
I'm a 40-year-old ST farmer from Jharkhand with 3 acres of agricultural land. My annual farming income is ₹2,50,000. I want to diversify my income.
I'm a 23-year-old woman from Mumbai who completed ITI in electrical trade. I'm currently unemployed. I want to start my own small electrical repairs business.
I'm a 32-year-old construction worker from a village in Uttar Pradesh. My annual income is ₹1,80,000. I have no formal pension coverage and want retirement security.
I'm a 16-year-old boy from a village in Assam. I don't have any bank account yet. My family has very limited income (₹60,000/year). I want a safe place to save.
I'm a 31-year-old SC woman from Gujarat running a jewelry business from my home. My annual business income is ₹3,50,000. I'm married and looking to expand.
